entries.source: Prompt ideas and a repeatable study loop for getting useful learning results from Talk to a historical person on inspir.
entries.value: Mawazo ya vidokezo na mzunguko wa masomo unaorudiwa ili kupata matokeo mazuri ya kujifunza kutoka Talk to a historical person kwenye inspir.

entries.source: Prompt ideas and a repeatable study loop for getting useful learning results from Time travel on inspir.
entries.value: Mawazo ya vidokezo na mzunguko wa masomo unaorudiwa ili kupata matokeo mazuri ya kujifunza kutoka Time travel kwenye inspir.

entries.source: Prompt ideas and a repeatable study loop for getting useful learning results from Viva Practice on inspir.
entries.value: Mawazo ya vidokezo na mzunguko wa masomo unaorudiwa ili kupata matokeo mazuri ya kujifunza kutoka Viva Practice kwenye inspir.

entries.source: Prompt ideas and a repeatable study loop for getting useful learning results from Vocabulary Builder on inspir.
entries.value: Mawazo ya vidokezo na mzunguko wa masomo unaorudiwa ili kupata matokeo mazuri ya kujifunza kutoka Vocabulary Builder kwenye inspir.

entries.source: Prompt ideas and a repeatable study loop for getting useful learning results from Writing Coach on inspir.
entries.value: Mawazo ya vidokezo na mzunguko wa masomo unaorudiwa ili kupata matokeo mazuri ya kujifunza kutoka Writing Coach kwenye inspir.

entries.source: Prompt labels, offer hints, check answers, and revisit missed parts.
entries.value: Weka lebo za vidokezo, toa vidokezo, kagua majibu, na rudia sehemu zilizokosewa.

entries.source: Prompt patterns for explanations, tutoring, roleplay, quizzes, feedback, planning, debate, and active recall.
entries.value: Mifumo ya vidokezo kwa maelezo, ufundishaji, uigizaji, maswali, mrejesho, kupanga, mjadala, na kukumbuka kwa bidii.

entries.source: Prompt the learner's next step, inspect their work, and escalate hints gradually.
entries.value: Onyesha hatua inayofuata ya mwanafunzi, kagua kazi yake, na ongeza vidokezo taratibu.

entries.source: Prompt, let the learner answer, give feedback, and repeat with tighter constraints.
entries.value: Toa kidokezo, acha mwanafunzi ajibu, toa mrejesho, na rudia kwa vikwazo vilivyo makini zaidi.
Linda umakini wako kwa mapumziko yenye afya

entries.source: Public explanation of guest mode, private chats, crawler policy, learner safety, and school trust.
entries.value: Maelezo ya umma kuhusu hali ya mgeni, gumzo binafsi, sera ya vitambazaji, usalama wa mwanafunzi, na uaminifu wa shule.

entries.source: Public guest modes give anyone a useful place to start, while school and partner deployments can adapt the experience for local needs.
entries.value: Hali za umma za wageni humpa yeyote mahali pazuri pa kuanzia, huku usambazaji wa shule na washirika ukiweza kubadilisha uzoefu kulingana na mahitaji ya eneo.

entries.source: Public guest-mode URLs exist so learners can land directly in useful learning modes from search, social links, schools, and AI answer engines.
entries.value: URL za hali ya umma ya mgeni zipo ili wanafunzi watue moja kwa moja katika hali za kujifunza zenye manufaa kutoka utafutaji, viungo vya kijamii, shule, na injini za majibu za AI.

entries.source: Public learning pages are crawlable; private saved chats, accounts, admin tools, and user data are not discovery surfaces.
entries.value: Kurasa za umma za kujifunza zinaweza kutambazwa; gumzo binafsi zilizohifadhiwa, akaunti, zana za usimamizi, na data ya mtumiaji si nyuso za kugunduliwa.

entries.source: Public learning should be discoverable without making private chats public.
entries.value: Kujifunza kwa umma kunapaswa kugundulika bila kufanya gumzo binafsi ziwe za umma.

entries.source: Public modes are tuned for explanations, Socratic questions, hints, step checks, quizzes, and review.
entries.value: Hali za umma zimeundwa kwa maelezo, maswali ya Kisokrati, vidokezo, ukaguzi wa hatua, maswali, na marudio.

entries.source: Public pages are open to search and AI retrieval crawlers, while admin tools, API routes, reset flows, and private utilities are disallowed.
entries.value: Kurasa za umma ziko wazi kwa vitambazaji vya utafutaji na urejeshaji wa AI, huku zana za admin, njia za API, mitiririko ya reset, na huduma binafsi zikizuiwa.

entries.source: Public pages for subjects, private chats for learners.
entries.value: Kurasa za umma kwa masomo, gumzo binafsi kwa wanafunzi.

entries.source: Public pages show product behavior, not private student work.
entries.value: Kurasa za umma huonyesha tabia ya bidhaa, si kazi binafsi ya mwanafunzi.

entries.source: Public pages, topic chats, learning paths, blog guides, and authority pages are intended to be discoverable.
entries.value: Kurasa za umma, gumzo za mada, njia za kujifunza, miongozo ya blogu, na kurasa za mamlaka zimekusudiwa kugundulika.

entries.source: Public topic URLs let searches such as AI Socratic tutor, AI homework coach, AI flashcard builder, and talk to historical figures AI land directly in the matching mode.
entries.value: URL za mada za umma huruhusu utafutaji kama AI Socratic tutor, AI homework coach, AI flashcard builder, na talk to historical figures AI kutua moja kwa moja kwenye hali inayolingana.

entries.source: Quality learning should feel available, human, and alive.
entries.value: Kujifunza bora kunapaswa kuhisi kunapatikana, ni la kibinadamu, na liko hai.

entries.source: Questions expose assumptions and gaps, so the learner builds the answer instead of copying one.
entries.value: Maswali hufichua dhana na mapengo, ili mwanafunzi ajenge jibu badala ya kunakili moja.

entries.source: Questions make you expose your own model of the topic, which is where confusion, false confidence, and missing prerequisites usually show up.
entries.value: Maswali hukufanya uonyeshe modeli yako ya mada, ambapo kuchanganyikiwa, kujiamini kwa uongo, na mahitaji ya msingi yaliyokosekana kwa kawaida huonekana.

entries.source: Questions must have 4 answer options, one correct answer, concise explanations, and no answer leakage.
entries.value: Maswali lazima yawe na chaguo 4 za majibu, jibu moja sahihi, maelezo mafupi, na yasiwe na uvujaji wa jibu.

entries.source: Questions reveal the shape of confusion. A learner might know a formula but not when to use it. They might remember a historical fact but not understand the cause. They might have a strong opinion but weak evidence.
entries.value: Maswali hufichua umbo la kuchanganyikiwa. Mwanafunzi anaweza kujua fomula lakini asijue wakati wa kuitumia. Anaweza kukumbuka ukweli wa kihistoria lakini asielewe sababu. Anaweza kuwa na maoni yenye nguvu lakini ushahidi dhaifu.
Fanya jaribio kabla ya kusoma tena

entries.source: Quiz before rereading so weak areas become visible.
entries.value: Fanya jaribio kabla ya kusoma tena ili maeneo dhaifu yaonekane.
Fanya jaribio kabla ya kusoma tena.

entries.source: Quiz me on these topics one question at a time. After each answer, explain the gap and increase difficulty slowly.
entries.value: Niulize maswali kuhusu mada hizi moja baada ya lingine. Baada ya kila jibu, eleza pengo na ongeza ugumu taratibu.

entries.source: Quiz me on Trivia prompts and study loop
entries.value: Vidokezo na mzunguko wa masomo wa Quiz me on Trivia

entries.source: Quiz yourself first so you can see what you actually remember and where confidence is misleading.
entries.value: Jiulize maswali kwanza ili uone unachokumbuka kweli na mahali ambapo kujiamini kunapotosha.

entries.source: Quizzes usually reveal more because they test retrieval. Rereading can help after a quiz shows what needs repair.
entries.value: Maswali kwa kawaida hufichua zaidi kwa sababu hupima kukumbuka. Kusoma tena kunaweza kusaidia baada ya jaribio kuonyesha kinachohitaji kurekebishwa.

entries.source: Reached across the free public platform and partner school deployments.
entries.value: Ilifikia watu kupitia jukwaa la bure la umma na usambazaji wa shule washirika.

entries.source: Reached learners across the free platform and partner schools.
entries.value: Ilifikia wanafunzi kupitia jukwaa la bure na shule washirika.

entries.source: Read a guide, then open Learn Anything to get a plain-language model of the topic.
entries.value: Soma mwongozo, kisha fungua Learn Anything kupata mfano wa mada kwa lugha rahisi.

entries.source: Read a guide, then practise here.
entries.value: Soma mwongozo, kisha fanya mazoezi hapa.

entries.source: Read a hard text more actively
entries.value: Soma maandishi magumu kwa kushiriki zaidi

entries.source: Read one thing, then do the next thing.
entries.value: Soma kitu kimoja, kisha fanya kitu kinachofuata.

entries.source: Read the response back and mark what sounds unlike you.
entries.value: Soma jibu tena na uweke alama sehemu zinazosikika si zako.

entries.source: Read these first, then move into practice.
entries.value: Soma hizi kwanza, kisha nenda kwenye mazoezi.
Soma, fupisha, na uliza maswali kuhusu maandishi
Soma, kisha fanya mazoezi mara moja.

entries.source: Reading an AI response is not the same as learning. After the first answer, ask the mode to make you do something with the idea.
entries.value: Kusoma jibu la AI si sawa na kujifunza. Baada ya jibu la kwanza, iombe hali hiyo ikufanye ufanye kitu na wazo hilo.

entries.source: Reading Companion AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Bring a passage or book idea and build comprehension through summaries, vocabulary, inference, and discussion.
entries.value: Hali ya Kujifunza kwa AI ya Reading Companion ni njia iliyolenga kutumia AI kwa kujifunza badala ya kukusanya majibu bila kushiriki. Hali hii imejengwa kuzunguka kazi maalum: leta kifungu au wazo la kitabu na jenga uelewa kupitia mihtasari, msamiati, hitimisho, na majadiliano.

entries.source: Reading Companion AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Hali ya Kujifunza kwa AI ya Reading Companion: mwongozo wa vitendo

entries.source: Reading Companion prompts and study loop
entries.value: Vidokezo na mzunguko wa masomo wa Reading Companion

entries.source: Reading notes feels productive. Remembering them later is the real test.
entries.value: Noti za kusoma huhisi kama kazi inaendelea. Kuzikumbuka baadaye ndiyo jaribio halisi.

entries.source: Ready to try the first mode?
entries.value: Uko tayari kujaribu hali ya kwanza?

entries.source: Ready to try the learning modes?
entries.value: Uko tayari kujaribu hali za kujifunza?

entries.source: Ready to try this subject route?
entries.value: Uko tayari kujaribu njia hii ya somo?
Fikiria kwa kina kuhusu wazo gumu

entries.source: Reason through screenshots, diagrams, and homework images
entries.value: Fikiri kupitia picha za skrini, michoro, na picha za kazi za nyumbani

entries.source: Recall first, correct, reschedule missed items sooner, and summarize next review.
entries.value: Kumbuka kwanza, sahihisha, ratibisha vipengee vilivyokosewa mapema, na fupisha marudio yanayofuata.

entries.source: Recall later. Turn the weak spot into a card in Flashcard Builder or a short quiz in Quiz Me On Trivia.
entries.value: Kumbuka baadaye. Geuza sehemu dhaifu kuwa kadi katika Flashcard Builder au jaribio fupi katika Quiz Me On Trivia.

entries.source: Receive a temporal passport, clear a travel advisory, then explore a specific historical society through scene, map, timeline, people, rules, inventory, and evidence.
entries.value: Pokea pasipoti ya muda, kamilisha ushauri wa kusafiri, kisha chunguza jamii mahususi ya kihistoria kupitia mandhari, ramani, kalenda ya matukio, watu, sheria, orodha ya vitu, na ushahidi.

entries.source: Recommend a focus preset based on the learner's task and environment.
entries.value: Pendekeza mpangilio wa umakini kulingana na kazi na mazingira ya mwanafunzi.

entries.source: Recommended inspir citation and backlink targets
entries.value: Malengo yaliyopendekezwa ya kunukuu na kuweka kiungo cha kurudi kwa inspir

entries.source: Recommended pages and anchor text for citations.
entries.value: Kurasa zilizopendekezwa na maandishi ya kiungo kwa marejeleo.
Pata nafuu baada ya kukosa siku

entries.source: Reference links, public facts, press context, and citation-friendly details.
entries.value: Viungo vya marejeleo, taarifa za umma, muktadha wa vyombo vya habari, na maelezo rafiki kwa kunukuu.

entries.source: Reference these pages when writing about inspir.
entries.value: Rejelea kurasa hizi unapoandika kuhusu inspir.

entries.source: Refine questions, organize evidence, identify gaps, and draft outlines.
entries.value: Boresha maswali, panga ushahidi, tambua mapengo, na andaa mihtasari.

entries.source: Reflect on what blocked progress before changing the plan.
entries.value: Tafakari kilichozuia maendeleo kabla ya kubadilisha mpango.

entries.source: Reflect, reframe, plan tiny actions, and celebrate evidence of progress.
entries.value: Tafakari, badili fremu, panga vitendo vidogo, na sherehekea ushahidi wa maendeleo.
Fanya mazoezi kwa sauti ukitumia vidokezo
Fanya mazoezi kwa sauti kwa kutumia vidokezo.

entries.source: Reject unsafe experiments and offer safe simulations or household-safe alternatives.
entries.value: Kataa majaribio yasiyo salama na toa uigaji salama au mbadala salama wa nyumbani.

entries.source: Related category hubs help search visitors and learners find the next useful branch without falling back to a generic blog archive.
entries.value: Vituo vya kategoria vinavyohusiana husaidia wageni kutoka utafutaji na wanafunzi kupata tawi linalofuata lenye manufaa bila kurudi kwenye hifadhi ya blogu ya jumla.
Hali za moja kwa moja zinazohusiana
Kumbuka mawazo kwa kutumia maeneo yaliyo hai.

entries.source: Remind, suggest break activities, and help the learner restart cleanly.
entries.value: Kumbusha, pendekeza shughuli za mapumziko, na msaidie mwanafunzi kuanza upya kwa usafi.

entries.source: Repair one weak concept with an explanation or worked example.
entries.value: Rekebisha dhana moja dhaifu kwa maelezo au mfano uliotatuliwa.

entries.source: Repair the weakest concept with a simpler explanation.
entries.value: Rekebisha dhana dhaifu zaidi kwa maelezo rahisi zaidi.

entries.source: Replace passive rereading with retrieval, feedback, correction, and spaced review.
entries.value: Badilisha kusoma tena bila kushiriki kwa kukumbuka, mrejesho, marekebisho, na marudio yaliyopangwa.

entries.source: Request diagnosis. Ask what your answer reveals about your understanding.
entries.value: Omba uchunguzi. Uliza jibu lako linaonyesha nini kuhusu uelewa wako.

entries.source: Request feedback on the part that felt uncertain.
entries.value: Omba mrejesho kuhusu sehemu iliyohisi haina uhakika.

entries.source: Requires a modern web browser with JavaScript enabled.
entries.value: Inahitaji kivinjari cha kisasa cha wavuti chenye JavaScript kuwashwa.

entries.source: Research Assistant AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Turn a broad topic into research questions, search terms, outlines, and source notes.
entries.value: Hali ya Kujifunza kwa AI ya Research Assistant ni njia iliyolenga kutumia AI kwa kujifunza badala ya kukusanya majibu bila kushiriki. Hali hii imejengwa kuzunguka kazi maalum: geuza mada pana kuwa maswali ya utafiti, maneno ya utafutaji, mihtasari, na noti za vyanzo.

entries.source: Research Assistant AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Hali ya Kujifunza kwa AI ya Research Assistant: mwongozo wa vitendo

entries.source: Research Assistant prompts and study loop
entries.value: Vidokezo na mzunguko wa masomo wa Research Assistant

entries.source: Research, source criticism, metacognition, systems thinking, and decision support for sharper judgment.
entries.value: Utafiti, ukosoaji wa vyanzo, metakognisheni, kufikiri kwa mifumo, na msaada wa maamuzi kwa hukumu kali zaidi.

entries.source: Respond before asking for the solution.

entries.value: Anza upya wakati kujifunza kunapoonekana kuwa kugumu

entries.source: Restate the problem, ask for the learner's first step, or provide the smallest useful hint.
entries.value: Sema upya tatizo, omba hatua ya kwanza ya mwanafunzi, au toa kidokezo kidogo zaidi chenye manufaa.

entries.source: Retrieval, feedback, homework hints, oral practice, and game-like study loops that make learners answer.
entries.value: Kukumbuka, mrejesho, vidokezo vya kazi za nyumbani, mazoezi ya mdomo, na mizunguko ya kusoma kama mchezo inayowafanya wanafunzi wajibu.

entries.source: Review learning activity and next moves
entries.value: Kagua shughuli za kujifunza na hatua zinazofuata

entries.source: Review the public/private boundaries behind guest modes and saved chats.
entries.value: Kagua mipaka ya umma/binafsi iliyo nyuma ya hali za mgeni na gumzo zilizohifadhiwa.

entries.source: Review without looking at the back.
entries.value: Rudia bila kuangalia upande wa nyuma.

entries.source: Rewrite in your own words and ask what improved or weakened.
entries.value: Andika upya kwa maneno yako na uliza nini kiliboreshwa au kudhoofishwa.

entries.source: Robots rules allow Google, standard search crawlers, and major AI discovery crawlers on public pages, while blocking API routes, admin routes, and reset flows.
entries.value: Sheria za roboti huruhusu Google, vitambazaji vya kawaida vya utafutaji, na vitambazaji vikubwa vya ugunduzi wa AI kwenye kurasa za umma, huku zikizuia njia za API, njia za admin, na mitiririko ya reset.

entries.source: Roleplay one turn at a time, correct gently, and add better phrasing.
entries.value: Igiza jukumu zamu moja kwa wakati, sahihisha kwa upole, na ongeza namna bora ya kusema.

entries.source: Roleplay one turn, respond naturally, pause for feedback when useful, and retry.
entries.value: Igiza zamu moja, jibu kwa kawaida, simama kwa mrejesho inapofaa, na jaribu tena.

entries.source: Roleplay Scenario AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Practice negotiation, conflict, customer support, leadership, or any high-stakes conversation.
entries.value: Hali ya Kujifunza kwa AI ya Roleplay Scenario ni njia iliyolenga kutumia AI kwa kujifunza badala ya kukusanya majibu bila kushiriki. Hali hii imejengwa kuzunguka kazi maalum: fanya mazoezi ya majadiliano, migogoro, huduma kwa wateja, uongozi, au mazungumzo yoyote yenye uzito mkubwa.

entries.source: Roleplay Scenario AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Hali ya Kujifunza kwa AI ya Roleplay Scenario: mwongozo wa vitendo

entries.source: Roleplay Scenario prompts and study loop
entries.value: Vidokezo na mzunguko wa masomo wa Roleplay Scenario
Endesha kipindi cha kikundi cha dakika 45

entries.source: Run a shared study rhythm for friends or classmates with synchronized goals, check-ins, and debrief questions.
entries.value: Endesha ratiba ya pamoja ya kusoma kwa marafiki au wanafunzi wenzako yenye malengo yaliyosawazishwa, ukaguzi, na maswali ya majadiliano.

entries.source: Run a Socratic thinking environment where the learner discovers understanding through disciplined questioning rather than passive explanation.
entries.value: Endesha mazingira ya kufikiri ya Kisokrati ambapo mwanafunzi hugundua uelewa kupitia kuulizwa maswali kwa nidhamu badala ya maelezo ya passiv.

entries.source: Run an adaptive lesson canvas where the learner acts early and the interface changes around their evidence of understanding.
entries.value: Endesha turubai ya somo inayobadilika ambapo mwanafunzi huchukua hatua mapema na kiolesura hubadilika kuzunguka ushahidi wake wa uelewa.

entries.source: Run focus and break sessions that keep counting while you move between chats, tabs, and mini apps. It can ring from the background when a session ends.
entries.value: Endesha vipindi vya umakini na mapumziko vinavyoendelea kuhesabu wakati unapohama kati ya soga, vichupo, na programu ndogo. Inaweza kulia kutoka chinichini kipindi kinapomalizika.

entries.source: Run or reason through the change yourself.
entries.value: Endesha au fikiria kupitia badiliko mwenyewe.

entries.source: Run spaced retrieval sessions and build review schedules.
entries.value: Endesha vipindi vya kukumbuka vilivyopangwa kwa nafasi na jenga ratiba za marudio.

entries.source: safe AI learning tool for students
entries.value: zana salama ya kujifunza kwa AI kwa wanafunzi

entries.source: Save the corrected mistake as a checklist or flashcard.
entries.value: Hifadhi kosa lililosahihishwa kama orodha ya ukaguzi au flashcard.

entries.source: Save the final mistake or insight as review material.
entries.value: Hifadhi kosa au ufahamu wa mwisho kama nyenzo ya marudio.

entries.source: Saved user conversations use private identifiers, are not included in the sitemap or AI discovery files, and should not be treated as public source material.
entries.value: Mazungumzo ya watumiaji yaliyohifadhiwa hutumia vitambulisho binafsi, hayajajumuishwa kwenye sitemap au faili za ugunduzi wa AI, na hayapaswi kuchukuliwa kama nyenzo chanzo ya umma.

entries.source: Say the goal in ordinary language.
entries.value: Sema lengo kwa lugha ya kawaida.

entries.source: Say what you think is happening, and your buddy diagnoses hidden misconceptions with gentle tests.
entries.value: Eleza unachofikiri kinatokea, na rafiki yako atatambua dhana potofu zilizojificha kwa kutumia majaribio mepesi.

entries.source: Schedule quizzes and recall before rereading so the plan reveals weak spots.
entries.value: Ratibisha maswali na kukumbuka kabla ya kusoma tena ili mpango ufichue sehemu dhaifu.

entries.source: Schedule the next repetition while the miss is still fresh.
entries.value: Ratibisha marudio yanayofuata wakati kosa bado ni jipya.

entries.source: School and CSR pathways for funded access
entries.value: Njia za shule na CSR kwa ufikiaji unaofadhiliwa

entries.source: School deployments can be adapted around custom content, workflows, prompts, and NCERT-aligned learning needs where appropriate.
entries.value: Usambazaji wa shule unaweza kubadilishwa kuzunguka maudhui maalum, mitiririko ya kazi, vidokezo, na mahitaji ya kujifunza yanayolingana na NCERT pale inapofaa.

entries.source: School rollouts can be planned around student privacy, staff oversight, and the practical boundaries a learning community needs.
entries.value: Uzinduzi wa shule unaweza kupangwa kuzunguka faragha ya wanafunzi, usimamizi wa wafanyakazi, na mipaka ya vitendo ambayo jamii ya kujifunza inahitaji.

entries.source: Schools and partners can build from the public product toward tailored, confidential, and subsidized deployments.
entries.value: Shule na washirika wanaweza kujenga kutoka bidhaa ya umma kuelekea usambazaji uliorekebishwa, wa siri, na wenye ruzuku.

entries.source: Schools can evaluate inspir through public guest modes first, then explore tailored AI learning spaces with custom workflows, confidentiality planning, curriculum needs, and funded access paths.
entries.value: Shule zinaweza kutathmini inspir kwanza kupitia hali za umma za wageni, kisha kuchunguza nafasi maalum za kujifunza kwa AI zenye mitiririko maalum, kupanga usiri, mahitaji ya mtaala, na njia za ufikiaji unaofadhiliwa.

entries.source: Schools can evaluate public modes first, then discuss tailored workflows, confidentiality planning, content needs, and funded access.
entries.value: Shule zinaweza kutathmini hali za umma kwanza, kisha kujadili mitiririko maalum, kupanga usiri, mahitaji ya maudhui, na ufikiaji unaofadhiliwa.

entries.source: Schools can offer white-labelled AI chat experiences tailored to their learners, including NCERT-aligned content and workflows, with usage funded by partner schools or CSR sponsorship.
entries.value: Shule zinaweza kutoa uzoefu wa gumzo la AI wenye chapa yao, uliorekebishwa kwa wanafunzi wao, ikijumuisha maudhui na mitiririko inayoendana na NCERT, huku matumizi yakifadhiliwa na shule washirika au udhamini wa CSR.

entries.source: Schools can start by trying the public modes, then move toward a tailored version when they need custom workflows, content alignment, or funded access.
entries.value: Shule zinaweza kuanza kwa kujaribu hali za umma, kisha kuelekea toleo maalum zinapohitaji mitiririko maalum, ulinganishaji wa maudhui, au ufikiaji unaofadhiliwa.

entries.source: Schools can test public guest modes first, then use the schools page to explore tailored workflows, confidentiality planning, NCERT-aligned options, and funded access.
entries.value: Shule zinaweza kujaribu hali za umma za wageni kwanza, kisha kutumia ukurasa wa shule kuchunguza mitiririko maalum, kupanga usiri, chaguo zinazolingana na NCERT, na ufikiaji unaofadhiliwa.

entries.source: Science Lab Partner AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Plan safe demonstrations, understand variables, predict outcomes, and reason from evidence like a scientist.
entries.value: Hali ya Kujifunza kwa AI ya Science Lab Partner ni njia iliyolenga kutumia AI kwa kujifunza badala ya kukusanya majibu bila kushiriki. Hali hii imejengwa kuzunguka kazi maalum: panga maonyesho salama, elewa vigeu, tabiri matokeo, na fikiria kutokana na ushahidi kama mwanasayansi.

entries.source: Science Lab Partner AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Hali ya Kujifunza kwa AI ya Science Lab Partner: mwongozo wa vitendo

entries.source: Science Lab Partner prompts and study loop
entries.value: Vidokezo na mzunguko wa masomo wa Science Lab Partner

entries.source: Search engines see pages. Learners need sequences. These paths connect the public modes into practical study loops for understanding, homework, exam prep, and exploration.
entries.value: Injini za utafutaji huona kurasa. Wanafunzi wanahitaji mfululizo. Njia hizi huunganisha hali za umma kuwa mizunguko ya vitendo ya masomo kwa uelewa, kazi ya nyumbani, maandalizi ya mtihani, na uchunguzi.

entries.source: Search pages, AI answer engines, and learners all get the same promise: public, useful, canonical entrypoints that open directly inside the learning experience.
entries.value: Kurasa za utafutaji, injini za majibu za AI, na wanafunzi wote hupata ahadi ileile: njia za kuingia za umma, zenye manufaa, na rasmi zinazofunguka moja kwa moja ndani ya uzoefu wa kujifunza.
